documentation.title: architecture incompatible
documentation.summary: A linked object or library was built for an architecture that does not match the requested target.
documentation.cause: The linker rejected an input whose CPU architecture differs from the target architecture.
documentation.action: Rebuild the object or library for the target architecture, or select a target that matches the available artifact.

documentation.title: entry point missing
documentation.summary: The linker could not find the native program entry point.
documentation.cause: No linked object exports the entry symbol expected for an executable target.
documentation.action: Build an executable source that defines the Vitte entry proc, or switch to a library target.

documentation.title: permission denied
documentation.summary: The linker could not read or write a required path because the operating system denied access.
documentation.cause: The output path, object path, library path, or parent directory does not allow the requested linker operation.
documentation.action: Choose a writable output path or update permissions for the required file or directory.
